title: rubus × epidasys
intro: Rubus × epidasys, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or thimbleberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between the black raspberry and the thimbleberry. The Rubus × epidasys plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which is known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or supplement, and is also used in jams, preserves, and other culinary applications.
